goal: Close all open branches from v3 through disciplined terminal decisions, then attempt weak-window targeted repair on the immutable base before considering any higher-friction exploration.
global_constraints: active-signal-v1@1 is immutable reference — never modify the base snapshot.
Previously rejected branches (H1_post_funding_long, H2_expiry_lead_lag, A1_high_iv_long_v1, A1b_high_iv_momentum, A4_wed_afternoon) must not be reopened.
Static high-IV regime is a volatility mode, not a directional signal — do not reinterpret as alpha.
Every hypothesis branch must reach a terminal decision (promoted or rejected) before the plan can advance past its wave.
Medium-friction wave is locked until low-friction wave is fully exhausted with recorded final verdict and no promoted candidate.
Maximum 2 weak pockets may be selected for specialist repair.
Separate data tasks from research results — never conflate them.

slices.title: Полностью закрыть A3_broader_cl_transition (только если A2 не promoted)
slices.hypothesis: Only if A2 was not promoted, bring the backup branch A3 to a terminal decision so no half-alive branches remain.
slices.objective: Only if A2 was not promoted, bring the backup branch A3 to a terminal decision so no half-alive branches remain.
success_criteria: A3 has a terminal decision: promoted or rejected with documented reason.
evidence_requirements: A3 has a terminal decision: promoted or rejected with documented reason.

slices.title: Общий вердикт по low-friction wave
slices.hypothesis: Produce a single binding final verdict on whether the low-friction candidate space has been exhausted.
slices.objective: Produce a single binding final verdict on whether the low-friction candidate space has been exhausted.
success_criteria: A single, unambiguous low_friction_final verdict is recorded.
evidence_requirements: A single, unambiguous low_friction_final verdict is recorded.

slices.title: Weak-window repair specialists (exploration)
slices.hypothesis: Determine whether targeted specialist features can repair the weakest performance pockets of the immutable base.
slices.objective: Determine whether targeted specialist features can repair the weakest performance pockets of the immutable base.
success_criteria: Answer recorded: can targeted repair produce anything useful beyond the base, or is the base already optimal within low-friction scope?
evidence_requirements: Answer recorded: can targeted repair produce anything useful beyond the base, or is the base already optimal within low-friction scope?
